final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade, ST_Centroid(omrade) AS centroid
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Trondheim%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT DISTINCT skredrisikokvikkleireklasse FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.utlopomr;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT objid, omrade, skredrisikokvikkleireklasse
FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.utlopomr
WHERE (skredrisikokvikkleireklasse)::int = (
  SELECT MAX((skredrisikokvikkleireklasse)::int) FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.utlopomr
);

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: spatial_join
-- left_source: 1
-- right_source: 3
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "omrade"
-- right_geom: "omrade"

4.description: reduce high-risk quick-clay polygons to Trondheim extent

5.description: get buildings in Trondheim municipality (filter by kommunenummer)

6.description: find buildings that intersect high-risk quick-clay polygons

7.description: compute distance from Trondheim centroid to each intersecting building

8.description: collapse to one row per building with minimum distance
